g.text: Child routes to itself instead of parent.
AND parent chain not yet registered.
If child NOT in sessionsRef → silent drop.

g.title: race_timeline
g.text: Race Condition — why rsk_check1 and rsk_check2 fail early
Event ordering (may interleave across SSE stream):
2. Child starts → emits content_start, thinking_delta … immediately
If step 2 events arrive at browser BEFORE step 3 is processed:
→ rsk_buffer_branch checks for child_session_id to buffer [FIX A]
→ without FIX A: falls through to setChronoItems
